summary: Current main at 5372c7146bb2b6014fc3a25139cf4c63a6087d45 still has voice-call await the completed embedded-agent run and read only terminal result.payloads, while the embedded-agent contract already supports onBlockReply/blockReplyBreak for pre-terminal block delivery. PR #94015 is the canonical useful contributor repair and maintainer_can_modify is true, but it is not merge-ready because preflight shows mergeability unknown, failed checks, and no Codex /review proof. Emit a repair-contributor-branch fix artifact; no GitHub mutations are planned.

actions.reason: Repair the existing contributor branch rather than replacing it: the diff is narrow, the branch is editable, and the source defect is still present on current main.
The issue is covered by the canonical repair path but must remain open until the fix lands.
A complete executable repair path exists and the job allows fix/raise_pr while forbidding direct merge/comment/close actions.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #94015 on the contributor branch so voice-call TTS extracts spoken text from early embedded-agent block replies when terminal result.payloads are empty or stale after post-turn compaction.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(voice-call): use early embedded replies for TTS
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs #94015 on the existing contributor branch so voice-call collects embedded-agent block replies before post-turn compaction can leave terminal payloads empty or stale.
- Prefers captured non-error, non-reasoning block replies for spoken extraction, falling back to result.payloads when no early payloads were captured.
- Adds a focused voice-call regression for early block replies with stale/empty terminal payloads.

## Credit
Based on #94015 by @xialonglee. Clownfish is carrying the same narrow fix path forward on the contributor branch so attribution stays with the source PR.

## Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/voice-call/src/response-generator.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Fresh Codex /review before merge consideration

## Not Changed
- No TTS policy changes.
- No compaction policy changes.
- No voice-call configuration changes.
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @xialonglee via https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94015.
Keep #79521 reporter context from @donkeykong91 in the PR body or release-note context if the repair changes user-visible voice-call latency.
